3 ?0 + ?7 = ?07

Matching
3 ?07 1110111001 7

Constant
3 C 3 1111111111 a mismatch
3 C 3n 0000000000 a mismatch

Unary 0
3 I 0 1001110011 6 mismatch
3 I 0n 0110001100 4 mismatch

Unary 7
3 I 7 0111001010 5 mismatch
3 I 7n 1000110101 5 mismatch

Binary 07
3 AND 07 0001000010 2 mismatch
3 AND 07n 1110111101 8 mismatch
3 OR 07 1111111011 9 mismatch
3 OR 07n 0000000100 1 mismatch
3 XOR 07 1110111001 7 match 1/1
all match XOR 07
3 XOR 07n 0001000110 3 mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07 1000110001 4 mismatch
3 AND-NOT 07n 0111001110 6 mismatch
3 OR-NOT 07 1001110111 7 mismatch
3 OR-NOT 07n 0110001000 3 mismatch

Matched
0 I 4

4 I 1
5 I 2

7 I 4

Extending defaults
3 1110111001 7
Starting at I 6 increasing
I 7 0111001010 partial 0110001100 4
left 4
Starting at I 1 decreasing
I 0 1001110011 partial 1000110101 5
right 5
Choosing right
3 I 0

Selected
0 I 4
1 I 5
2 I 6
3 XOR 07
4 I 1
5 I 2
6 I 3
7 I 4

Applying to 00111011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 0
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 4 = 1
1 I 5 = 0
2 I 6 = 1
3 XOR 07 = XOR(I 0,I 7) = XOR(0,1) = 1
4 I 1 = 0
5 I 2 = 1
6 I 3 = 1
7 I 4 = 1

\boxed{10110111}
